## What & why

<!-- What does this change and why? Link any related issue (#123). -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes (new behavior has new tests — see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds
- [ ] Updated README / CHANGELOG if user-facing
- [ ] Change stays in scope (reads a local log, no network/telemetry)
